    descriptionBring John McClain to the surface of Lak so he can start the excavation.

    completeDescriptionJohn McClain: “Thank you again! I will start excavating the surface and then go deeper into the core. My expedition crew are already set and if you want to explore some yourself, feel free to do so. Here is your final reward.”
